rag_no_rag_summary: It was confident in saying no which made it right as well
rag_grounded_summary: This time explain in more detail about the policy and what can be done with it
stretch_notes: The customer is not covered under the Standard Limited Warranty because it expired after 12 months, and a cracked screen is considered accidental damage, which is covered only by an active Samsung Care+ plan. If there is no active Care+ plan, the customer can use Samsung's authorized repair service at their own expense.
